# Predictions

Predictions about future events Robin has made, and how they resolved. Source of truth; `calibration.md` is the derived rollup.

Each prediction includes: claim, check-by date, confidence, reasoning, originating session. Resolution adds outcome + resolved-at + resolution-source.
